top_signals.title: Oil Markets Stop Believing Trump’s Peace Narrative
top_signals.summary: Fresh strikes on Kuwait and Oman undermine hopes of a U.S.-Iran de-escalation, keeping oil markets on edge and traders skeptical of diplomatic progress. Friday, June 05, 2026 This week’s strikes on Kuwait and the Friday morning attack on Oman have dented hopes for a de-escalation between US and Iran following the much-publicized Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. Whilst Oman’s main port is reportedly up and running again, capping ICE Brent around the $95 per barrel mark, most global crude benchmarks will post weekly gains of 2-3%. Against this…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority – Memorandum of Understanding on the supervision of Financial Market Infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Joint statement from the Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan steps up efforts on cooking oil in race for sustainable aviation fuel​​
top_signals.summary: The world's fourth-biggest economy estimates it needs about 1.7 million kiloliters in 2030, and hopes to gain as much as it can domestically through used cooking oil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SpaceX signs $30bn deal to lease computing capacity to Google
top_signals.summary: Agreement comes ahead of a record-breaking initial public offering for Elon Musk’s rockets-to-AI conglomerate
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Strategy’s Saylor says Bitcoin should avoid choosing between ‘purity and adoption’ as BTC extends losses
top_signals.summary: Strategy Exec Chairman Michael Saylor divided the Bitcoin ecosystem into four camps, saying that each serves a necessary role.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cardano social activity surges as ADA falls under 20 cents to four-year lows
Burnham vows to cut the price of a pint as he turns on Labour tax rises
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham has launched a major policy intervention of the Makerfield by-election campaign with a pledge to cut business rates for pubs and ease the tax burden on small businesses, marking a clear break with Keir Starmer’s government. The Greater Manchester mayor said Labour had “got it wrong” on small businesses as he unveiled plans [...]

top_signals.title: Takaichi faces heat over defamatory campaign video scandal
top_signals.summary: A report claims that her campaign posted defamatory videos of her rivals on social media during election time. The release of audio recordings has intensified the controversy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
